name: Bill Check Reminder
subject: bill check - {{month}}
html_content: rent to ray already out. check power + phone, move whats left to savings.

name: Tools Fund Transfer Reminder
subject: tools fund transfer - {{month}}
html_content: move ${{amount}} into the tools fund. still saving for the no. 7 jointer.

name: Rent Reminder
subject: rent to ray - $650 venmo
html_content: send ray the $650 rent on venmo by the 15th.

name: Insurance Due Reminder
subject: truck insurance due
html_content: truck insurance payment due this month, dont forget.

name: Gig Load-In Reminder
subject: load-in reminder - {{venue}}
html_content: load in at {{venue}} at {{time}}. grab the spare cables + tuner.

name: Invoice Follow-Up
subject: quick nudge on invoice {{invoice}}
html_content: hey, just following up on {{invoice}}. no rush, venmo or cash both fine. thanks.

name: Deposit Thank You
subject: got your deposit - {{piece}}
html_content: deposit came through, thanks. starting on the {{piece}} this week.

name: Delivery Scheduling
subject: ready to schedule delivery - {{piece}}
html_content: {{piece}} is done. what day works to drop it off? i can bring it after 4.

name: Dentist Appointment Reminder
subject: reschedule the dentist already
html_content: call and rebook the cleaning before mom asks again.

name: Band Practice Reminder
subject: practice tonight - travis garage 7
html_content: practice at travis at 7. throw the bass + amp in the truck.

name: Lumber Pickup Reminder
subject: hardwood pickup - {{vendor}}
html_content: pick up the walnut order at {{vendor}}. bring the ratchet straps.

name: Sunday Lunch Reminder
subject: lunch at dad's - garner noon
html_content: sunday lunch at dad's around noon. fuel up on the way.

name: Quote Expiring Reminder
subject: your quote expires soon - {{piece}}
html_content: the quote on your {{piece}} runs out end of month. lmk if you still want it.

name: Board Care Instructions
subject: how to keep your board happy
html_content: wipe it, dont soak it, and re-oil every month or so. tin of wax is in the bag.

name: Setlist Reminder
subject: finalize setlist - {{venue}}
html_content: lock the setlist with travis before {{venue}}. two sets, 45 each.

name: Apprenticeship Check-In
subject: waketech check-in with sullivan
html_content: zoom check-in with sullivan this week. log the on-site hours first.

name: Savings Sweep Reminder
subject: sweep leftover to savings
html_content: whatever's left after bills goes to savings. keep the jointer fund moving.

name: Craft Market Reminder
subject: pack the truck for the market
html_content: boards, frames, a card reader and the folding table. leave by 7.

name: Truck Oil Change Reminder
subject: truck is due for an oil change
html_content: truck's about due. book it before the next gibsonville run.

name: Final Balance Reminder
subject: balance due on delivery - {{piece}}
html_content: heads up, the remaining balance on the {{piece}} is due when i drop it off. venmo or cash.
